summary: Tested 4 bug fixes for Doula/Midwife provider features. Backend APIs: 11/11 tests passed. Code review confirms all 4 fixes are properly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: Birth Plan Breadcrumb Fix: Correctly checks returnTo param to determine Doula vs Midwife navigation (line 266-270)
Birth Plan Note Editing: Edit button added with data-testid='edit-note-btn-{id}', calls openNoteModal with existing note (line 492-499)
Contract PDF Download: handleViewPDF properly opens PDF URL with window.open for web, Linking for native (line 293-314)
Contract E-Sign Removal: Sent contracts now show 'Awaiting Mom's Signature' instead of E-Sign button (line 452-456)

success_rate.frontend: Code review confirms fixes are properly implemented

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for provider (Doula/Midwife) features tested. Contract statuses: contract_6cc57257d974 (Signed), contract_9067983f2507 (Draft), contract_96735522ebb6 (Sent). Birth plan notes can be created via POST /api/provider/birth-plan/{mom_id}/notes and edited via PUT /api/provider/birth-plan-notes/{note_id}. PDF download returns proper application/pdf content.

features_tested.birth_plan_breadcrumb_fix: VERIFIED - Code correctly uses returnTo param to navigate to /(midwife)/clients or /(doula)/clients
features_tested.birth_plan_note_editing: PASS - Backend API PUT /api/provider/birth-plan-notes/{id} returns 200, Edit button added in UI code
features_tested.contract_pdf_download: PASS - GET /api/contracts/{id}/pdf returns 200 with application/pdf content (9182 bytes verified)
features_tested.contract_esign_removal: VERIFIED - Code shows 'Awaiting Mom's Signature' for Sent contracts, no E-Sign button
features_tested.contract_status_flow: PASS - Draft shows Send/Delete, Sent shows status indicator, Signed shows PDF button
